description_long: This is a pair of low-top sneakers featuring a woven beige upper with a textured knit pattern. The shoes have vibrant green outsoles with a blue and magenta stripe running along the midsole, adding a playful and urban touch. The tongue and heel area display a colorful, abstract graphic, while the side panels have a small, multicolored embroidered detail. The shoes are equipped with standard laces and a cushioned collar for comfort. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for casual wear in urban environments. The materials appear to be a combination of textile, rubber, and foam, providing both flexibility and durability.
description: A pair of beige woven sneakers with colorful soles and abstract graphic accents, featuring standard laces and a modern, urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, woven texture, and colorful tongue graphics.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the knit pattern, multicolored side embroidery, and layered sole colors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vibrant abstract graphic on the heel and the green outsole.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the knit upper, side embroidery, and the colorful midsole striping.
attribute_logo: colorful abstract graphic on tongue and heel; small multicolored embroidery on side
